title: Tax Analyst
description: FedEx, the world's leading logistics company, seeks a Tax Analyst to support our corporate tax strategy. Working remotely from Boulder, you'll research tax regulations, prepare compliance filings, and analyze tax implications for logistics operations across multiple states. Build expertise in complex multistate tax issues while supporting one of the world's largest transportation companies.
responsibilities: Research and analyze federal and state tax regulations relevant to logistics
Prepare corporate income tax returns and supporting schedules
Conduct tax provision analysis and estimate quarterly tax payments
Support tax planning initiatives and identify optimization opportunities
Maintain tax compliance calendars and coordinate filing deadlines
Collaborate with external tax advisors and accounting firms

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
skills: Federal and state income tax knowledge
Excel and tax preparation software proficiency

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and wellness coverage
